title: Eat everything
body:
# Eat Everything

Picture this:
You're deep in the mines and you had just eaten your last bit of food. You normally have 2 options: die of starvation, or eat rotten flesh and then die of starvation.
But worry not, for this mod gives you a third path: eat everything. Yes, eat everything. See that rock? eat it. See that pickaxe in your hotbar? eat it.

This mod allows you to consume almost every block and item in the game. Exceptions include things like bows, tridents, etc... 
![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dH55WOKq/images/2974d1dfb520675cf432893ff29c25150a92719c.gif)
## Configuration
This mod allows you to change the default properties for non-food items including:
- Consume time
- Nutrition
- Saturation modifier
- Always edible
The mod is server-side but if you want to configure through a GUI (instead of the JSON file), an operator will need to have the mod installed on their client and open it using `/eateverything_config` or through Mod Menu.

There are other mods like this but they rely on other libraries and/or are out of date. Hope you enjoy this absolutely necessary and useful mod!
